# Self-hosted web fonts

Vendored so the site makes **zero third-party requests** (no calls to
`fonts.googleapis.com` / `fonts.gstatic.com`). The full SIL Open Font License
text and the family's copyright notice are kept in `Inter-OFL.txt` beside this
file, as the license requires.

| Family | Weights | Subsets | License |
|---|---|---|---|
| Inter | 300, 400, 500, 600, 700, 800 | latin | [SIL Open Font License 1.1](https://openfontlicense.org) |

Source: Google Fonts. To refresh, re-download the `woff2` files for the same
weights and keep `fonts.css` in sync.
